ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recipe */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the recipe */,
  "prep_time" INTEGER /* Preparation time in minutes */,
  "cook_time" INTEGER /* Cooking time in minutes */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings */,
  "instruction" TEXT /* Cooking instruction */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the recipe image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the recipe belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recipe was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe the ingredient belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cups, grams) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plans" (
  "meal_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meal plan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meal plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meal plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meal plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meal plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_plan_recipes" (
  "meal_plan_recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal plan recipe */,
  "meal_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal plan the recipe belongs to */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) */,
  "meal_type" TEXT /* Type of meal (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_plan_recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plan_recipes_meal_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_plan_id") REFERENCES meal_plans ("meal_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_plan_recipes_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., home cook, professional chef, nutritionist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "nutritional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional information */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe the nutritional information belongs to */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat per serving */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrates per serving */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Fiber per serving */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar per serving */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium per serving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutritional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_info_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grocery_lists" (
  "grocery_list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grocery list */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the grocery list */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the grocery list */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grocery list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grocery_list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grocery_lists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grocery_list_items" (
  "grocery_list_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grocery list item */,
  "grocery_list_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grocery list the item belongs to */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grocery_list_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grocery_list_items_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grocery_list_items_grocery_list_id FOREIGN KEY ("grocery_list_id") REFERENCES grocery_lists ("grocery_list_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who bookmarked the recipe */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe bookmarked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_bookmarks_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
